summary: John Carter attempts to meet the women at the city edge with his thoats, but finds the rendezvous compromised. After hiding his animals, he overhears Thark warriors planning to ambush him and take him to the vaults, while Dejah Thoris is being taken to Tal Hajus.

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH016_SC006

- chapter_id: `CH016`
- scene_title: `The climax of the chapter; a failed plan leads to an ambush and high-...`

## Production Intent

The climax of the chapter; a failed plan leads to an ambush and high-stakes peril.

## Storyboard

John Carter attempts to meet the women at the city edge with his thoats, but finds the rendezvous compromised. After hiding his animals, he overhears Thark warriors planning to ambush him and take him to the vaults, while Dejah Thoris is being taken to Tal Hajus.
